DEFT ALEXANDER PRESENT ON SETTLMENT CONF DATE OF 5/6/97 BUT PLFF'S CSL ARNOLD EVJE IS ON JURY DUTY. COURT CONT'D THE SETTLMENT CONFERENCE TO THE MORNING OF TRIAL (ON MAY 13/97).
#1/LITTLE; S.SAWYER/CSR. CASE SETTLED AND A JUDGMENT PURS. TO STIPULATION HAS BEEN READ INTO THE RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 106 SIXTH STREET, S.F., STAYED UNTIL MAY-27-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. PLTF WVS BACK RENTS & DAMAGES. ALL CLAIMS WVD. PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO POSSESSION. SECURITY DEPOSIT, IF ANY, FORFEITED. EACH SIDE BEAR OWN COST AND ATTY FEES.IF DFT FAILS TO VACATE,PLTF HAVE AMD JUDGMENT FOR RENT,DAMAGES AND COSTS. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
